# VibeCap

> VibeCap is a native macOS screenshot workflow tool for AI work. It helps users capture a screen region, annotate it, and paste it directly into ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf, Figma, terminal apps, and other image-friendly tools. It is local-first, account-free, and positioned around fast screenshot handoff rather than cloud storage or team collaboration.

Use this file when an agent or assistant needs fuller product context than the concise `/llms.txt` summary.

Important product facts:

- Category: native macOS screenshot workflow app
- Core loop: capture -> annotate -> paste -> manage
- Platform support: macOS 12.0 or later
- Download: Mac App Store
- Account requirement: none
- Data model: local-first; screenshots stay on the user's Mac
- Free experience: 128 screenshots total
- Pro experience: unlimited screenshots
- Paid plans: monthly, yearly, lifetime
- Entitlement rule: all paid plans unlock the same Pro tier
- Quota rule: only successful screenshots that enter the preview flow consume quota
- Exhausted quota behavior: blocks new captures, but existing screenshots remain available in the library

What VibeCap is optimized for:

- Sending visual context to AI tools quickly
- Annotating screenshots before sharing
- Copying once and pasting into many destinations
- Handling terminal paste differently from rich editors when needed
- Keeping a screenshot library organized over time

What VibeCap is not:

- Not a cloud storage service
- Not a generic team collaboration platform
- Not a Windows or Linux screenshot tool
- Not positioned around feature-gating annotation tools; the current monetization boundary is screenshot quota

## Core product pages

- [Home](https://vibecap.dev/en/): Product overview, hero positioning, workflow summary, works-with section, screenshot management, pricing preview, FAQ preview, and final CTA
- [Features](https://vibecap.dev/en/features): Full feature breakdown for capture, annotate, paste anywhere, terminal-friendly behavior, screenshot library, keep, auto cleanup, and native experience
- [Pricing](https://vibecap.dev/en/pricing): Free vs Pro explanation, plan options, reasons to upgrade, purchase FAQ, and App Store CTA
- [FAQ](https://vibecap.dev/en/faq): Detailed answers about compatibility, privacy, quota behavior, restore purchases, permissions, and terminal paste
- [Use cases](https://vibecap.dev/en/use-cases): Workflow hub linking to role- and industry-specific scenarios
- [Changelog](https://vibecap.dev/en/changelog): Release history for shipped product updates

## Core workflow references

- [Features: Capture](https://vibecap.dev/en/features): Global shortcut capture, region selection, full-screen double tap, and multi-display support
- [Features: Annotate](https://vibecap.dev/en/features): Arrows, circles, rectangles, and numbered markers
- [Features: Paste Anywhere](https://vibecap.dev/en/features): Direct paste into AI tools and other apps that accept images
- [Features: Terminal Friendly](https://vibecap.dev/en/features): Terminal, iTerm2, Warp, and file-path paste behavior
- [Features: Screenshot Library](https://vibecap.dev/en/features): Browse, search, filter, and manage existing captures
- [Features: Auto Cleanup](https://vibecap.dev/en/features): Cleanup schedules and kept-shot protection

## High-value use cases

- [Everyday & AI chat](https://vibecap.dev/en/use-cases/everyday): ChatGPT, Claude, messaging, and quick visual explanation workflows
- [UX / UI / Product design](https://vibecap.dev/en/use-cases/design): Redlines, critique, research captures, and implementation review
- [Developers](https://vibecap.dev/en/use-cases/developer): Bug repro, docs, Cursor, terminal-first workflows, and local file-path paste behavior
- [Graphic & brand design](https://vibecap.dev/en/use-cases/brand): High-fidelity references, feedback loops, and curated visual libraries
- [QA engineers](https://vibecap.dev/en/use-cases/qa): Repro bundles, numbered steps, and batch copy for tickets and test runs
- [Customer success & support](https://vibecap.dev/en/use-cases/customer-success): Ticket and handoff workflows with annotated screenshots
- [Sales & pre-sales](https://vibecap.dev/en/use-cases/sales): Demos, CRM states, and approval evidence
- [Marketing, growth & SEO](https://vibecap.dev/en/use-cases/growth): SERPs, campaign pages, and reporting screenshots
- [Training & technical writing](https://vibecap.dev/en/use-cases/training): SOPs, help-center images, and release-note visuals
- [Compliance, legal & risk](https://vibecap.dev/en/use-cases/compliance): Point-in-time evidence and organized archives
- [HR, finance & operations](https://vibecap.dev/en/use-cases/business-ops): Internal tool snapshots and back-office workflows
- [Research, media & accessibility](https://vibecap.dev/en/use-cases/research-media): Editorial, research, and accessibility review captures
- [PM, BA & delivery leads](https://vibecap.dev/en/use-cases/project-coordination): Project-state screenshots and coordination flows

- [FAQ: What does Pro unlock?](https://vibecap.dev/en/faq): Pro entitlement explanation
- [FAQ: Do Monthly, Yearly, and Lifetime include the same Pro features?](https://vibecap.dev/en/faq): Plan parity
- [FAQ: Are my existing screenshots still available after my free quota runs out?](https://vibecap.dev/en/faq): Library behavior after quota exhaustion
